summary: Completed testing of Free Tier feature (Iteration 10). All features working correctly: 4 subscription tiers displayed, lock icons on restricted pages for free users, proper redirects to /subscription, toast messages, and auth flow regression passed.

issues: Console warning: nested button inside button (bookmark button inside accordion trigger) - not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Google Play server-side verification is MOCKED - currently trusts purchase tokens from client without calling Google Play Developer API
Minor React warning: nested button inside button in PlumbingCodePage.jsx (bookmark button inside accordion trigger) - cosmetic issue, not blocking
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 tested the new Free Tier feature. All features verified: 4 subscription tiers (Free $0, Basic $4.99, Pro $9.99, Enterprise $19.99), lock icons on restricted pages for free users (8 pages: Notes, Timesheet, Materials, Job Bidding, OSHA, Safety Data, Total Station, Blueprints), proper redirects to /subscription when free user tries to access restricted pages, toast message 'Upgrade your plan to access this feature' when clicking locked nav items, new user registration redirects to /subscription (not /dashboard), existing user login still redirects to /dashboard. Pro user (testplumber@test.com) has full access with no lock icons. FREE_TIER_PATHS in App.js: /dashboard, /formulas, /safety-talks, /calendar, /calculator, /settings, /subscription, /subscription/success, /plumbing-code.
passed_tests: Subscription page shows 4 tiers: Free ($0), Basic ($4.99), Pro ($9.99), Enterprise ($19.99)
Free tier card shows 'Current Plan' button for free users
Free tier features listed: Calculator & Formulas, Safety Talks, Calendar & Scheduling, Plumbing Code Reference
Sidebar shows 8 lock icons on restricted pages for free users (Notes, Timesheet, Materials, Job Bidding, OSHA, Safety Data, Total Station, Blueprints)
Free user CAN access: /dashboard
Free user CAN access: /formulas
Free user CAN access: /safety-talks
Free user CAN access: /calendar
Free user CAN access: /calculator
Free user CAN access: /plumbing-code
Free user CAN access: /settings
Free user CANNOT access /notes - redirects to /subscription
Free user CANNOT access /timesheet - redirects to /subscription
Free user CANNOT access /materials - redirects to /subscription
Free user CANNOT access /bidding - redirects to /subscription
Free user CANNOT access /osha - redirects to /subscription
Free user CANNOT access /sds - redirects to /subscription
Free user CANNOT access /total-station - redirects to /subscription
Free user CANNOT access /blueprints - redirects to /subscription
Clicking a locked nav item redirects to /subscription with toast message 'Upgrade your plan to access this feature'
New user registration redirects to /subscription (not /dashboard)
Auth flow regression - existing user login still works and redirects to /dashboard
Pro user (testplumber@test.com) can access all pages without locks
Pro user sees NO lock icons in sidebar
Pro tier shows 'Current Plan' button for pro user on subscription page

tier_gated_route.toast_message: Upgrade your plan to access this feature

mocked_apis.google_play_server_verification: Server-side Google Play Developer API verification is stubbed. Currently trusts purchase tokens from client and records them without calling Google API. Full verification requires Google Cloud Service Account JSON.
